pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 11 to Java 17 to enable compilation for the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against Java 11, potentially missing Java 17 language features or failing if the build environment enforces JDK 17 compatibility checks.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation-api with jakarta.annotation-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes required by Spring Boot 3 and Java 17 ecosystems.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer available in the default classpath of newer JDKs and Spring Boot 3 requires Jakarta EE 9+ namespaces; using javax will cause ClassNotFoundException or compilation errors if the code references these annotations.
